standard_frameworks.name: EU Standard Contractual Clauses (2021/914)
standard_frameworks.description: Mandatory framework for transferring personal data from EU/EEA to third countries without an adequacy decision, replacing the 2010 SCCs.

standard_frameworks.name: UK International Data Transfer Agreement (IDTA)
standard_frameworks.description: UK replacement for EU SCCs following Brexit, providing a standalone framework for international personal data transfers from the UK.

standard_frameworks.name: UK International Data Transfer Addendum to EU SCCs
standard_frameworks.description: UK addendum that can be appended to EU SCCs to make them valid for UK data transfers, providing an alternative to the standalone IDTA.

standard_frameworks.name: EDPB Guidelines on Processor Agreements (07/2020)
standard_frameworks.description: Guidelines on concepts of controller and processor under GDPR, providing practical guidance on structuring data processing agreements.

standard_frameworks.name: EDPB Recommendations on Supplementary Measures (01/2020)
standard_frameworks.description: Recommendations on supplementary measures to supplement transfer tools to ensure compliance with EU personal data protection standards following Schrems II.

standard_frameworks.name: EU AI Act Contractual Requirements (2024/1689)
standard_frameworks.description: Contractual obligations arising from the EU AI Act for providers, deployers, importers, and distributors of AI systems across risk categories.

standard_frameworks.name: EU Cyber Resilience Act Supply Chain Requirements
standard_frameworks.description: Contractual requirements for products with digital elements regarding cybersecurity, vulnerability handling, SBOM provision, and security update obligations.

standard_frameworks.name: DORA ICT Third-Party Risk Management Framework
standard_frameworks.description: Mandatory contractual provisions for financial entities outsourcing ICT services under the Digital Operational Resilience Act, including critical provider requirements.

standard_frameworks.name: ICC Incoterms 2020
standard_frameworks.description: International Commercial Terms defining the responsibilities of sellers and buyers for the delivery of goods under sales contracts, covering 11 trade terms.

standard_frameworks.name: UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods (CISG)
standard_frameworks.description: International treaty governing contracts for the international sale of goods between parties in different contracting states. Applies by default unless expressly excluded.
standard_frameworks.authority: United Nations Commission on International Trade Law

standard_frameworks.name: UNIDROIT Principles of International Commercial Contracts (2016)
standard_frameworks.description: Non-binding restatement of general principles for international commercial contracts, widely used as a guide for contract interpretation and gap-filling.
standard_frameworks.authority: International Institute for the Unification of Private Law

standard_frameworks.name: ICC Model Contract for International Sale of Goods
standard_frameworks.description: Model contract providing standard terms for international sale of manufactured goods, incorporating Incoterms and international trade best practices.

standard_frameworks.name: ICC Force Majeure and Hardship Clauses 2020
standard_frameworks.description: Updated model force majeure and hardship clauses that can be incorporated into any contract, addressing pandemic and cyber-attack scenarios.

standard_frameworks.name: UNCITRAL Model Law on International Commercial Arbitration
standard_frameworks.description: Model law adopted by many jurisdictions providing a framework for international commercial arbitration, including arbitral procedure, awards, and enforcement.
standard_frameworks.authority: United Nations Commission on International Trade Law

standard_frameworks.name: Hague Convention on Choice of Court Agreements (2005)
standard_frameworks.description: International convention providing rules for the enforcement of exclusive choice of court agreements in international civil and commercial matters.
standard_frameworks.authority: Hague Conference on Private International Law

standard_frameworks.name: ISDA Master Agreement (2002)
standard_frameworks.description: Standard master agreement for over-the-counter derivatives transactions, providing the contractual framework for bilateral trading relationships.

standard_frameworks.name: ISDA Credit Support Annex (CSA)
standard_frameworks.description: Standardized collateral agreement for OTC derivatives, specifying credit support obligations, eligible collateral, and margin requirements.

standard_frameworks.name: LMA Facility Agreement
standard_frameworks.description: Standard form facility agreement for syndicated lending published by the Loan Market Association, widely used in European leveraged and investment grade lending.

standard_frameworks.name: BAFT Master Participation Agreement
standard_frameworks.description: Standard master agreement for trade finance risk distribution, enabling banks to participate in trade finance assets through funded and unfunded sub-participations.
standard_frameworks.authority: Bankers Association for Finance and Trade

standard_frameworks.name: NIST SP 800-161r1 Cybersecurity Supply Chain Risk Management
standard_frameworks.description: Guidance for identifying, assessing, and mitigating cybersecurity supply chain risks, including contractual requirements for ICT/OT suppliers.
standard_frameworks.authority: National Institute of Standards and Technology

standard_frameworks.name: NIST Cybersecurity Framework 2.0
standard_frameworks.description: Voluntary framework consisting of standards, guidelines, and best practices for managing cybersecurity risk, including supply chain risk management category.
standard_frameworks.authority: National Institute of Standards and Technology

standard_frameworks.name: CISA Secure by Design Principles
standard_frameworks.description: Principles for technology manufacturers to build security into products from the design phase, with contractual implications for procurement.

standard_frameworks.name: ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Supplier Relationship Controls
standard_frameworks.description: Information security management system standard including Annex A controls A.5.19-A.5.23 for supplier relationships and cloud service security.

standard_frameworks.name: ISO/IEC 27701:2019 Privacy Information Management
standard_frameworks.description: Extension to ISO 27001/27002 for privacy information management, providing guidance for PII controllers and processors with contractual requirements.

standard_frameworks.name: SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria
standard_frameworks.description: Trust services criteria for evaluating controls relevant to security, availability, processing integrity, confidentiality, and privacy in service organizations.
standard_frameworks.authority: American Institute of Certified Public Accountants

standard_frameworks.name: CSA STAR (Security, Trust, Assurance, and Risk)
standard_frameworks.description: Cloud security assurance program providing multiple levels of assurance through self-assessment, third-party audit, and continuous monitoring.

standard_frameworks.name: OWASP Software Assurance Maturity Model (SAMM)
standard_frameworks.description: Framework for formulating and implementing a software security strategy, with contractual implications for secure development lifecycle requirements.

standard_frameworks.name: FAR Part 27 - Patents, Data, and Copyrights
standard_frameworks.description: Federal Acquisition Regulation provisions governing intellectual property rights in government contracts, including data rights, patent rights, and copyright allocation.

standard_frameworks.name: FAR 52.227-14 Rights in Data - General
standard_frameworks.description: Standard FAR clause defining government rights in technical data and computer software delivered under government contracts, with limited rights and restricted rights categories.

standard_frameworks.name: DFARS 252.227-7013 Rights in Technical Data - Noncommercial
standard_frameworks.description: Defense-specific clause defining government rights in noncommercial technical data, with unlimited rights, government purpose rights, and limited rights categories.

standard_frameworks.name: DFARS 252.227-7014 Rights in Noncommercial Computer Software
standard_frameworks.description: Defense-specific clause defining government rights in noncommercial computer software and documentation, with restricted rights protections for contractor-developed software.

standard_frameworks.name: Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC) 2.0
standard_frameworks.description: DoD program requiring defense contractors to achieve and maintain cybersecurity certification at levels commensurate with the sensitivity of controlled unclassified information.

standard_frameworks.name: FAR Part 12 - Acquisition of Commercial Products and Services
standard_frameworks.description: FAR provisions for acquiring commercial products and services with streamlined procedures and commercial item IP protections.

standard_frameworks.name: SBIR/STTR Data Rights Protection
standard_frameworks.description: Data rights protections for Small Business Innovation Research and Small Business Technology Transfer programs, providing extended protection periods for developed technologies.

standard_frameworks.name: FAR 52.227-11 Patent Rights - Ownership by Contractor
standard_frameworks.description: Standard patent rights clause implementing Bayh-Dole Act, allowing contractors to retain title to inventions made under government contracts with government license rights.
